name: REX AMERICAN RESOURCES Corp
business: REX AMERICAN RESOURCES Corp invests in and operates ethanol production facilities, producing ethanol, distillers grains, and distillers corn oil. It also is developing a carbon sequestration project at its One Earth Energy ethanol plant.
sellsTo: fuel blenders and obligated parties under the Renewable Fuel Standard

exposures.sentence: We currently have equity investments in three ethanol production entities, two of which are majority ownership interests.
One Earth Sequestration, LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of One Earth Energy, LLC, is in the developmental stage of a carbon sequestration project near the One Earth Energy ethanol plant.
Our ability to generate 45Z production tax credits involves regulatory and market uncertainties.

catalysts.event: EPA draft permit for carbon sequestration injection wells expected by May 2026, final permit decision expected in Q3 2026
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect the EPA to prepare a draft permit by May 2026 and make a final permit decision during the third quarter of 2026, according to the EPA’s Class VI Permit Tracker Dashboard on their website.

catalysts.event: EPA issued Renewable Volume Obligations for 2026 and 2027 at 15.0 billion gallons of conventional ethanol each year
catalysts.sentence: On March 27, 2026, the EPA issued RVOs for 2026 and 2027 of 15.0 billion gallons of conventional ethanol for each year.
